name: PT Kapuas Prima Coal Tbk
summary: PT Kapuas Prima Coal Tbk engages in the mining and trading businesses in Indonesia. The company primarily mines iron ore and galena; and produces zinc, lead, and silver ores. Its mining concession area comprises 5,569 hectares. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Jakarta Utara, Indonesia. PT Kapuas Prima Coal Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Sarana Inti Selaras.
